ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Continued To Nov-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gilbert Jay for Benita Lee.

Mr. Jay reported that there are no assets in the estate, that they will file a 12251 petition and requested a 45-60 day continuance. The Court stated that this case has been languishing and that they need to get the estate closed. The status of filing and inventory & appraisal and petition for final distribution was continued to November 23, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
